title: Fluff
description: Fluff, a special resource pack that transforms foliage to a new level of fluff while still keeping the vanilla look!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54e80b1afd7d0d1c675ae09f33f42e622af39f43.png)

**A resource pack that brings foilage to a new level!**
Does not require ~~optifine.~~
